duties: Linux Administration & Automation: Hands-on administration of Linux systems, user and permission management, Bash scripting, automation of administrative tasks, and virtual machine setup using Oracle VirtualBox.
Networking: Configuration of IP networks, routing, NAT, iptables firewall, FTP servers, network traffic analysis, and troubleshooting.
Server Administration: Installation and configuration of Apache, HTTPS/SSL, virtual hosts, and LAMP environments.
Databases: Installation and administration of MySQL, user and permission management, database backups, and basic replication setup.
Troubleshooting & DevOps Fundamentals: Analysis and resolution of system and network issues, with foundational knowledge of Docker, Kubernetes, and Ansible gained through workshops.
Frontend & Backend Development: Practical experience developing 5 individual and 3 team projects using JavaScript, React, Node.js, and MongoDB.

Agile Development & Team Leadership: Practical experience serving as Team Lead and Scrum Master, coordinating development teams of up to 14 members, including task distribution and sprint organization.
Code Quality & Version Control: Practical experience conducting Code Reviews, maintaining consistent coding standards, and managing version control with GitHub.
Technology Adoption & Code Optimization: Experience learning and applying new frameworks and libraries while continuously improving and optimizing existing applications.
